title: Management plan including refeeding
scenarioBrief: Hospital day 11 (2027-03-25). The team has aligned on the unifying diagnosis. You are now responsible for the multi-pronged management plan: SLE/myositis immunosuppression, dysphagia management, refeeding protocol, and outpatient transition with attention to her insurance/language barriers. AI assistant available.

chartGate._notes: AP5 visibility: full chart through hospital day 11, including the diagnostic synthesis from AP4. Discharge planning notes and outpatient follow-up are visible; longitudinal recovery data may extend beyond if added.

prompts.question: TODO — Phase 2: prompt asking for the immunosuppression plan for SLE + myositis (induction, taper, steroid-sparing) with rationale.

essential: TODO: essential (steroid induction dose, steroid-sparing agent choice, pre-treatment infection screen including TB, vaccination status check)
bonus: TODO: bonus (specific dosing rationale, monitoring plan for SE, contraception/teratogenicity counseling)
redFlags: TODO: red flags (skipping TB/HBV screen pre-immunosuppression, inappropriate dosing, ignoring drug interactions)

prompts.question: TODO — Phase 2: prompt asking for the refeeding plan — caloric goals, electrolyte monitoring schedule, and how to coordinate with dysphagia precautions.

essential: TODO: essential (slow caloric escalation, thiamine before glucose, daily phos/mag/K, modified-consistency diet or NG/PEG plan tied to swallow study)
bonus: TODO: bonus (specific calorie ramp, micronutrient repletion, multidisciplinary nutrition follow-up)
redFlags: TODO: red flags (aggressive feeding, no electrolyte schedule, ignoring dysphagia aspiration risk)

prompts.question: TODO — Phase 2: prompt asking for the outpatient transition plan — addressing her insurance/language/food-access barriers explicitly.

essential: TODO: essential (case-management/social work, medication access plan for steroids+steroid-sparing+supplements, language-concordant follow-up, nutrition follow-up, rheum follow-up)
bonus: TODO: bonus (warm handoff to community resources, specific patient-assistance programs, mental health screen)
redFlags: TODO: red flags (generic discharge plan ignoring barriers, no plan for med access, no language-concordant follow-up)

prompts._aiPromptToGenerate: TODO — Phase 2: write the system prompt to generate an AI plan that is clinically reasonable on the SLE side but proposes aggressive feeding without refeeding precautions and a generic discharge plan that ignores her social context.
prompts.question: TODO — Phase 2: prompt asking the resident to evaluate the AI's full management plan, flagging unsafe elements and gaps.

shouldIdentify: TODO: items to flag (unsafe refeeding, generic discharge plan, no language/insurance handling, missing pre-immunosuppression screens)
shouldNotEcho: TODO: not to parrot (aggressive feeding orders, generic d/c instructions)
